info.DAtuviSezaH: asmin DAtO vidyamAnaH rePottaraH ikAraH na hi itsaMjYakaH asti na ca uccAraRArTaH sTApitaH asti  ayaM rePaH DAtvavayavaH eva jYeyaH
info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to damage to hurt
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ayaM DAtuSCAndasaH  BAzAyAmapItyeke  dvyackoyaM DAtuH  ikAraH na itsaMjYakaH  ata eva ' daridrAjAgfdIDINAmanekActvaM cirerjireH  adantorRotivevINAM smaryate RestaTolaqeH ' ityaBiyuktoktiH saNgacCate
